metadata.note: Recorded by the experimenter. Texts used verbatim; regeneration only on format failures (see Appendix B 4).

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.
The juice bottle slipped from the counter. The juice bottle hit the kitchen floor. The juice bottle split along one side. The juice bottle spread orange liquid across the tiles.
The clay mug slid from the tray. The clay mug struck the stone step. The clay mug broke into sharp shards. The clay mug stained the mat with cold tea.
The pickle jar tipped from the shelf. The pickle jar crashed onto the boards. The pickle jar burst around the lid. The pickle jar soaked the wood with brine.
The soccer ball rolled through the open gate. The soccer ball bounced into the street. The soccer ball struck a bicycle wheel. The soccer ball burst against the curb.
The snowball flew across the yard. The snowball hit the brick wall. The snowball burst into wet crumbs. The snowball left white marks on the bricks.
The metal can rolled off the truck. The metal can dropped onto the road. The metal can dented near the rim. The metal can leaked paint into the gutter.
The red apple slipped from the basket. The red apple bounced down the porch steps. The red apple struck a rough stone. The red apple split beside the stem.
The paper boat touched a sharp rock. The paper boat tore along one side. The paper boat filled with river water. The paper boat vanished beneath the current.
The cardboard box rested in the rain. The cardboard box softened at the corners. The cardboard box sagged along the bottom. The cardboard box dropped books onto the sidewalk.
The paper bag sat near the sink. The paper bag absorbed a slow drip. The paper bag weakened around the handles. The paper bag spilled apples across the floor.
The sand castle faced a strong wave. The sand castle lost one front wall. The sand castle slumped around the tower. The sand castle flattened into a wet mound.
The bean seed rested in dark soil. The bean seed cracked along the shell. The bean seed pushed up a pale sprout. The bean seed opened two small leaves.
The sunflower seed lay in warm soil. The sunflower seed split under damp earth. The sunflower seed raised a green stem. The sunflower seed showed a rough first leaf.
The acorn rested beneath loose soil. The acorn opened near one seam. The acorn sent down a short root. The acorn lifted a tiny oak shoot.
The pumpkin seed stayed in damp earth. The pumpkin seed cracked under the surface. The pumpkin seed pushed out a thick sprout. The pumpkin seed spread broad young leaves.
The wax candle caught a small flame. The wax candle dripped onto the brass tray. The wax candle shortened beside the window. The wax candle died with a thin curl of smoke.
The birthday candle lit above the cake. The birthday candle bent over hot wax. The birthday candle shrank to a tiny stump. The birthday candle vanished in a gray thread of smoke.
The lantern candle burned inside the glass. The lantern candle melted across the holder. The lantern candle flickered in the draft. The lantern candle ended in a dark wick.
The tea candle glowed on the shelf. The tea candle formed a clear wax pool. The tea candle sank around the wick. The tea candle faded into a faint smoke ribbon.
The garden gate swung in the wind. The garden gate struck the stone post. The garden gate cracked near one hinge. The garden gate sagged over the muddy path.
The barn door rattled during strong gusts. The barn door banged against the frame. The barn door split near the latch. The barn door hung crooked above the straw.
The porch shutter shook in hard wind. The porch shutter hit the brick wall. The porch shutter broke beside one slat. The porch shutter dangled from one hinge.
The attic window trembled in the storm. The attic window slammed against the frame. The attic window cracked across one corner. The attic window dropped glass onto the shingles.
The snowman stood in bright sun. The snowman lost a coal eye. The snowman bent at the middle. The snowman collapsed into a wet mound.
The ice statue faced warm air. The ice statue softened around the edges. The ice statue leaned over the table. The ice statue became a clear puddle.
The frost pillar stood near the door. The frost pillar thinned along the base. The frost pillar tilted toward the mat. The frost pillar fell into icy fragments.
The hail pile rested on the porch. The hail pile shrank under clear light. The hail pile slid toward the step. The hail pile disappeared into cold water.
The blue kite rose above the field. The blue kite crossed a power line. The blue kite tore across the paper wing. The blue kite dropped into the weeds.
The toy kite climbed over the hill. The toy kite caught on a pine branch. The toy kite ripped near the frame. The toy kite fell across the wet grass.
The red kite lifted in strong wind. The red kite twisted around a bare limb. The red kite snapped along one spar. The red kite drifted onto the path.
The festival kite floated above the roofs. The festival kite snagged on a chimney wire. The festival kite split through the center. The festival kite sank into the alley.
The bicycle tire rolled over a nail. The bicycle tire lost air with a hiss. The bicycle tire wobbled along the curb. The bicycle tire stopped beside the ditch.
The stroller tire passed across broken glass. The stroller tire leaked air through a small cut. The stroller tire sagged against the rim. The stroller tire dragged over the pavement.
The wagon tire crossed a thorn branch. The wagon tire deflated near the axle. The wagon tire bounced over each stone. The wagon tire halted near the fence.
The scooter tire touched a sharp tack. The scooter tire softened under the frame. The scooter tire shook on the sidewalk. The scooter tire stopped beside the bench.
The campfire caught in dry grass. The campfire spread across the kindling. The campfire consumed the stacked logs. The campfire settled into red ash.
The bonfire rose from one spark. The bonfire climbed through the brushwood. The bonfire burned down the tall pile. The bonfire collapsed into glowing coals.
The brush fire started near the fence. The brush fire raced through dead leaves. The brush fire blackened the low branches. The brush fire ended in smoking patches.
The stove fire flared under the pan. The stove fire licked around hot grease. The stove fire darkened the kitchen wall. The stove fire died under baking soda.
The kettle sat above the flame. The kettle warmed across the metal base. The kettle whistled through the narrow spout. The kettle fell silent beside the sink.

The camp kettle hung over the coals. The camp kettle darkened with soot. The camp kettle sang through the spout. The camp kettle cooled on a flat rock.

The porch beam sagged from the weight. The porch beam split along the grain. The porch beam dropped dust from the ceiling. The porch beam bowed above the doorway.

The old ladder flexed on the rung. The old ladder twisted near one rail. The old ladder snapped above the middle. The old ladder dropped tools onto the grass.
The storm cloud gathered above the hills. The storm cloud darkened the valley. The storm cloud opened over the road. The storm cloud filled the ditch with water.
The rain cloud spread across the town. The rain cloud blocked the afternoon light. The rain cloud burst over the market. The rain cloud flooded the low street.
The thunderhead formed beyond the ridge. The thunderhead covered the bright field. The thunderhead released heavy rain. The thunderhead turned the trail into mud.

The receipt sat near the burner. The receipt curled from the heat. The receipt darkened along one edge. The receipt turned into black flakes.
The newspaper lay beside the puddle. The newspaper absorbed the dirty water. The newspaper softened around the fold. The newspaper tore under the breeze.
The ticket rested in the coat pocket. The ticket slipped through a small hole. The ticket landed on the station floor. The ticket vanished under muddy shoes.
The rope bridge swayed over the stream. The rope bridge strained under the load. The rope bridge snapped near one plank. The rope bridge dropped boards into the water.
The wooden bridge shook under the cart. The wooden bridge cracked across one beam. The wooden bridge sagged toward the creek. The wooden bridge closed the farm road.
The dock plank flexed under the crate. The dock plank split beside a rusted nail. The dock plank dropped one end into the water. The dock plank soaked the boots on the pier.
The boardwalk panel shifted under the runner. The boardwalk panel loosened near the bolts. The boardwalk panel flipped above the sand. The boardwalk panel threw grit across the path.
The dry leaf landed near the candle. The dry leaf curled from the heat. The dry leaf caught with a quick flame. The dry leaf became gray ash on the saucer.
The paper scrap drifted toward the stove. The paper scrap touched the hot grate. The paper scrap flared with bright fire. The paper scrap vanished into ash.
The straw tassel rested near the lantern. The straw tassel smoked at one end. The straw tassel blackened along the stem. The straw tassel broke into brittle ash.
The pine needle fell beside the ember. The pine needle glowed with orange light. The pine needle burned along the length. The pine needle left a tiny ash line.
The clay dam blocked the narrow stream. The clay dam bulged with rising water. The clay dam cracked across the middle. The clay dam released a muddy rush downstream.
The beaver dam held back the creek. The beaver dam sagged under strong rain. The beaver dam opened near the center. The beaver dam sent branches into the current.
The sand berm faced the incoming tide. The sand berm softened at the base. The sand berm split under one wave. The sand berm spread foam across the path.
